[INFO] Print Spooler Issues aggregated digest

Use case: UC-1.2.20 — Print Spooler Issues
Severity tier: low (digest)

This item is included in the informational digest. Review during the next scheduled triage window unless correlated with higher-severity activity.

Print spooler crashes affect print services and have historically been attack vectors (PrintNightmare). Monitoring catches both operational and security issues.

Catalogue link: https://fenre.github.io/splunk-monitoring-use-cases/uc/UC-1.2.20/
Detected at: {timestamp_placeholder}
SPL summary: {spl_summary}
